name: Rumaki #1
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken livers into halves or large chunks.
2. Cut the largest chestnuts in half.
3. Cut the bacon strips in half, crosswise.
4. Wrap a piece of bacon around pieces of liver and chestnuts, securing the ends with a toothpick. Place them as you make them in a shallow pie plate.
5. Combine the soy sauce with spices and pour over the rumaki. Refrigerate about 1/2 hour before serving.
6. Preheat the grill or broiler. Broil the rumaki until the bacon is crisp, turning to brown on all sides, about 20 minutes.
7. Serve hot.
